calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Candidate-support repair and weak forced-bias dose response
items.note: Compares normal CEM, diagnostic scaffold support, and use_support_preserving_cem, then runs scaffolded action-0 forced-bias dose response. Diagnostic only; evidence_direction remains non_contributory.
